title: Media Coverage | Growthik Media
description: Growthik in the press across digital marketing hubs.

sections.heading: In the Press.
sections.content: Media CoverageIn the Press.A selection of publications detailing our exponential growth systems and scaling capabilities.Press InquiriesGrowthik Media in the SpotlightOur approach to "Growth Engineering" has caught the attention of leading tech and marketing publications. We believe in sharing our methodology with the broader Pune startup ecosystem.Whether it's discussing the future of AI-powered marketing or detailing our technical SEO success stories, our team is frequently cited for their data-first perspective and engineering-led execution.Scaling Startups in Pune's IT CorridorTech Insights IndiaThe Death of Traditional AgenciesMarketing HubNext.js: The New Gold Standard for SEODev QuarterlyMedia Archive SynchronizingOur archive of interviews, press releases and editorial features is currently being migrated to this new layout. We are ensuring all external links are verified for your seamless reading experience.
